zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de la Haye of Erroll於大約1292年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵時，他的父親Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland23歲，母親Margaret Graham of Menteith14歲。他於1316年與Lora Cuningesburgh在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1332年8月12日在蘇格蘭培爾迪普林享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de la Haye of Erroll于大约1292年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵时，他的父亲Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland23岁，母亲Margaret Graham of Menteith14岁。他于1316年与Lora Cuningesburgh在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1332年8月12日在苏格兰培爾迪普林享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Haye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Willi.

North German, East Frisian, and Dutch: from a personal name, Frisian Hajo, ancient Germanic Haio; or from a short form of the female name Hadewig, composed of the elements hadu ‘battle, strife’ + wīg ‘war’.
German: variant of   Hey   4, 5.

variants.name: Deshayes
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from the plural of Old French haye ‘hedge’ (see Haye and Hayes ), with fused preposition and definite article des ‘from the’; or a habitational name denoting someone from Les Hayes, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Deshaies .

variants.name: Hayenga
meanings: East Frisian: patronymic from the personal name Hajo (see Haye 1). It is formed with the suffix -enga, a variant of -inga (from the patronymic suffix -ing and genitive plural ending -a).

variants.name: Hey
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hay  .
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized (or archaic) and Flemish, of Heij, a topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, Dutch hei, heide.
German: metonymic occupational name for a grower or mower of grass, from Middle High German höu ‘grass, hay’.

variants.name: Hayen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse.  German Heinz, Wilhelm.
Flemish, East Frisian, and North German: patronymic from   Haye   1.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

variants.name: Nicolas
meanings: From Late Greek. See Nicholas .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de la Haye of Erroll was born about 1292, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland, was 23 and his mother, Margaret Graham of Menteith, was 14. He married Lora Cuningesburgh in 1316, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 August 1332, in Dupplin, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de la Haye of Erroll est né environ 1292, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Graham of Menteith, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Lora Cuningesburgh en 1316, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 août 1332, à Dupplin, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de la Haye of Erroll um 1292 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland 23 und seine Mutter Margaret Graham of Menteith 14. Er hat 1316 in Schottland, United Kingdom Lora Cuningesburgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. August 1332 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Dupplin, Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de la Haye of Erroll è nato il circa 1292 nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Graham of Menteith, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Lora Cuningesburgh nel 1316, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 agosto 1332, nel Dupplin, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de la Haye of Errollが約1292年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで生まれた時，父Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotlandは23歳，母Margaret Graham of Menteithは14歳であった。1316年にイギリススコットランドでLora Cuningesburghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年8月12日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアダップリンで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de la Haye of Erroll(이)가 대략 1292년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Graham of Menteith(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1316년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Lora Cuningesburgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 8월 12일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 드업플린에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de la Haye of Erroll nasceu aproximadamente 1292, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Graham of Menteith, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Lora Cuningesburgh em 1316, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1332, em Dupplin, Perthshire, Scotland, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de la Haye of Erroll родился около 1292 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Graham of Menteith, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Lora Cuningesburgh в 1316 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 августа 1332 г. в местности дупплинь, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de la Haye of Erroll nació aproximadamente 1292, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Gilbert de Haya 5th of Erroll, , Lord High Constable of Scotland, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Graham of Menteith, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Lora Cuningesburgh en 1316, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1332, en Dupplin, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 41 años.
